description: SaveNoteRequested is specified in REQ-008 and placed in Step 3. However, workflows.md Workflow 2 event table (lines 282-287) does NOT list SaveNoteRequested as an emitted event. The event exists in events.ts and workflows.ts has BuildSaveNoteRequested and EmitSaveAndTransition confirming it belongs to this workflow. The placement in Step 3 conflicts with EmitSaveAndTransition in workflows.ts which couples the event with the EditingState-to-SavingState transition (before the Vault write dispatch).
